com.scivicslab.pluggablecli.CommandDefinition

  • com.scivicslab.pluggablecliでのCommandDefinitionの使用

    CommandDefinitionを返すcom.scivicslab.pluggablecliのメソッド
    修飾子とタイプ
    メソッド
    説明
    CommandDefinition
    CommandRepository.getCommand(String command)
    Returns the definition for the given command, or null if not found.
    CommandDefinition
    CommandRepository.removeCommand(String command)
    Removes a single command by name.
    CommandDefinition型のパラメータを持つcom.scivicslab.pluggablecliのメソッド

    説明
    void
    CommandRepository.addCommand(CommandDefinition definition)
